file_module_map.purpose: Session memory log

decisions_log.decision: Install Visual Studio Build Tools to satisfy Rust linking requirements on Windows
decisions_log.reason: `anchor-cli` and many Rust crates require a system linker (link.exe) to compile native code on Windows
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Use a Linux/macOS machine or WSL where GNU toolchain is available

next_steps: Verify `link.exe` and `cl.exe` are available in the MSVC environment
Retry `cargo install` for Anchor CLI or run `anchor build` in the project
If Windows build issues persist, consider using WSL or a Linux CI environment to build the program
sessions.notes: Installer progress (e.g., package 133 of 342) shows many SDK/runtime components being installed; these are required for the MSVC toolchain to provide the `link.exe` linker that Rust needs on Windows.
